description: Core window + shell access for the cc-console shell.
comment: The window navigates to the daemon at http://127.0.0.1:<port>/, a remote origin. Without listing it under `remote`, Tauri v2 won't expose IPC to those pages, so window.__TAURI__ is absent and `plugin:shell|open` (Sign in / Subscribe → system browser) silently fails. Allow the loopback daemon so the served UI can open external links.
